description: Action dropdown menu triggered by a button, supporting icons and keyboard navigation. Items are rendered via TmDropdownItem children.

examples.title: Basic dropdown with items
examples.code:
<TmDropdown Text="Actions" OnSelect="HandleSelect">
    <TmDropdownItem Value="edit" Icon="edit">Edit</TmDropdownItem>
    <TmDropdownItem Value="delete" Icon="trash">Delete</TmDropdownItem>
</TmDropdown>

examples.title: Dropdown with leading icon
examples.code:
<TmDropdown Text="Options" Icon="settings" OnSelect="HandleSelect" Disabled="false">
    <TmDropdownItem Value="export">Export</TmDropdownItem>
    <TmDropdownItem Value="print">Print</TmDropdownItem>
</TmDropdown>
